diamond_clue: Look at the diamond in the sun: blue, amber, then green.

door_rug.description: A rug that can be placed on the trapdoor.
door_rug.name: rug

rechargeable_lamp.description: A lamp with a limited charge.
rechargeable_lamp.name: rechargeable lamp

sun_diamond.description: A diamond that reveals colored light.
sun_diamond.name: sun diamond

torch.description: A flame source unsafe around gas.
torch.name: torch

wrench.description: A wrench for the water-wheel shutoff.
wrench.name: wrench

button_hall.description: Three buttons glow blue, amber, and green.
button_hall.name: Three-Button Hall
button_hall.story: The diamond in sunlight reveals the operating sequence.

gas_room.description: Gas fills the room. A ventilation valve is nearby.
gas_room.name: Smelly Room
gas_room.story: A lit torch causes a big boom unless the valve clears the gas.

lamp_workshop.description: A hand-cranked station recharges the lamp.
lamp_workshop.name: Lamp Workshop
lamp_workshop.story: Lamp life is based on average travel pace and distance back to this charger.

mill_room.description: A water wheel drives a dangerous shaft.
mill_room.name: Water-Wheel Mill
mill_room.story: Use the wrench to turn off the wheel.

neanderthal_gallery.description: Displays cover shelters, pigments, hunting, and stone-tool traditions.
neanderthal_gallery.name: Neanderthal Gallery
neanderthal_gallery.story: Neanderthals lived across Europe and western Asia and adapted to varied climates.

prism_gallery.description: Sunlight separates into blue, amber, and green.
prism_gallery.name: Prism Gallery
prism_gallery.story: Neanderthals made sophisticated tools, used pigments, and cared for injured community members.

sunlit_courtyard.description: A diamond rests in direct sunlight.
sunlit_courtyard.name: Sunlit Courtyard
sunlit_courtyard.story: Five treasures are hidden beyond old engineering puzzles.

trapdoor_room.description: A rug lies beside a fitted trapdoor.
trapdoor_room.name: Rug and Trapdoor Room
trapdoor_room.story: Place the rug, open the trapdoor, then go down.

treasure_vault.description: Five recesses surround a stone chest.
treasure_vault.name: Five-Treasure Vault
treasure_vault.story: Bring all five treasures here to win.

title: The Five Treasures of the Hidden Valley
